message:
fix(lint): resolve pre-existing clippy errors unblocking all agents

- semantic_conformance_harness: refactor drive_cancel_protocol to tuple args (too_many_arguments)
- rwlock: add explicit drop(state) in release_writer else branch (significant_drop_tightening)
- rwlock: fix OwnedRead/WriteFuture borrow ordering (drop state before self mutation)
- rwlock_lost_wakeup_test: format cleanup from cargo fmt
- semantic_gate_evaluation: single-char pattern fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
